title: malvastrum tomentosum
intro: Malvastrum tomentosum, also known as the woolly malvastrum, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, Malvastrum tomentosum is often used to make infusions, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
